what_it_is: Ferulic-acid esters + sterols from RBO; nutraceutical/cosmetic anti-oxidant
value_density: High (part of USD 2.6-4.4 bn global market; RBO is 68% of feedstock)
india_status: India world's #1 RBO producer but oryzanol largely un-isolated; India market only ~USD 6.5 mn

what_it_is: Tocotrienol-rich fraction (vitamin E) from rice bran / DD
india_status: India imports 60-70% of natural vit-E; domestic tocopherol output only ~150-200 t (30-40% of use)
market_size: Global vit-E large; TRF high-margin low-volume

what_it_is: d-alpha / mixed tocopherols (vitamin E) from deodorizer distillate
india_status: India net importer; DD feedstock (Rs 45-75/kg) domestic and under-exploited

what_it_is: Hard vegetable wax from RBO refining; carnauba substitute for cosmetics/polish
india_status: India potential ~20000 t; current unpurified ~10000 t

what_it_is: Phenolic antioxidant from rice/wheat bran; cosmetics/pharma
value_density: Standard Rs 450-1000/kg; cosmetic-grade up to Rs 15550/kg
india_status: India has abundant bran feedstock; Asia-Pacific 43% of global supply

what_it_is: Plant sterols (beta-sitosterol etc.) cholesterol-lowering functional ingredient
value_density: Part of USD 1.1 bn global market; premium ingredient
india_status: India largely imports; extracted from DD/vegetable-oil streams

what_it_is: Hypoallergenic bran protein concentrate/isolate
india_status: India domestic Rs 230-450/kg; infant-formula segment growing 15-20%/yr

what_it_is: De-oiled rice bran; feed/dietary fibre after oil extraction
india_status: Large feed stream; export was banned to Sep-2025 then reopened Oct-2025

what_it_is: High-purity precipitated silica (98-99%+) from rice husk ash; tyre/solar/semiconductor
value_density: Raw RHA Rs 1-3.5/kg -> precipitated silica many-x higher (global mkt ~USD 980 mn by 2027)
india_status: India burns/dumps most husk; high-purity silica largely imported

what_it_is: Activated carbon / biochar from carbonised husk; water treatment / soil / carbon credits
india_status: >30 mn t husk/yr in India; RHA market ~USD 2.9 bn global

what_it_is: Husk-fired boiler / co-generation power
india_status: Widely used in rice mills / grain distilleries

what_it_is: Gluten-free hypoallergenic starch for food/pharma/cosmetics
value_density: Mid value; premium vs corn starch
india_status: India rice-starch market ~USD 46 mn by 2030 (6.1% CAGR)

what_it_is: Hypoallergenic plant protein from broken rice
india_status: Growing (vegan/infant); India exports

what_it_is: Poha / murmura / idli-dosa mix / rice flour FMCG
india_status: Large domestic; co-op DPR template

what_it_is: Extruded rice-shaped kernels with iron/folic-acid/B12 blended 1% into PDS rice
india_status: Program ~Rs 2700 cr/yr; Rs 17082 cr to 2028; capacity 111 LMT fortified rice; ~3.5-4 LMT FRK/yr demand

what_it_is: High-vitamin-E / octacosanol nutraceutical oil from wheat germ
india_status: Germ is a wasted milling fraction; India exports small volumes

what_it_is: ~75% protein wheat gluten for bakery/meat-analogue/pet-food
india_status: India IMPORTS ~13000 t/yr (China 88%) despite 2nd-largest wheat producer

what_it_is: Native/modified wheat starch (co-product of gluten) for food/paper/pharma
value_density: Mid value; part of USD 3.45 bn India starch mkt
india_status: Co-produced with gluten; India wet-milling nascent

what_it_is: Glucose syrup / maltodextrin from wheat starch
india_status: India starch-derivatives USD 3.45 bn (7.3% CAGR); Roquette-Riddhi Siddhi active

what_it_is: Wheat bran for feed / dietary fibre / ferulic acid feedstock
india_status: Large domestic feed stream

what_it_is: Atta fortified with iron/folic-acid/B12 for PDS
india_status: Voluntary; ~2.0-2.5 LMT/yr est; ITC/Aashirwaad/Patanjali participate

what_it_is: Milled flour fractions (refined flour / semolina / whole-wheat)
india_status: Very large domestic staple

what_it_is: Corn starch (wet-milling core) for food/paper/textile
value_density: Part of ~Rs 3500 cr organised starch industry
india_status: India #3 producer; 2.6 mn t output net exporter; ~14% of maize wet-milled

what_it_is: Dextrose / HFCS / sorbitol / maltodextrin from corn starch
india_status: Growing; Gujarat Ambuja / Roquette investing; India imports refined derivatives

what_it_is: 60-65% protein feed / pigment source
value_density: Feed premium (~Rs 40-60/kg); high vs world std
india_status: India exports maize gluten to >25 countries; Gujarat+Punjab 60%

what_it_is: Corn oil + germ meal from wet-milling germ fraction
india_status: Byproduct of wet-milling; import substitution

what_it_is: Gluten feed / distillers grains (also from ethanol stream)
india_status: Large with ethanol expansion

what_it_is: Gram (chana) flour; huge domestic staple
india_status: India besan output >5 mn t (>50% of ~10 mn t desi chickpea); global gram-flour mkt USD 2.5-5.6 bn

what_it_is: Milled/split dal (toor/urad/moong/masur)
india_status: NAFED/NCCF procure and auction raw; margin ungifted

what_it_is: Pea/pulse protein isolate for plant-protein/export
india_status: India exports to US/UK/EU/UAE; feed-plant-protein mkt USD 85-360 mn

what_it_is: Chuni / husk / brokens as cattle & poultry feed
india_status: Large milling byproduct

what_it_is: Crude/refined edible oil (mustard/soy/groundnut/sunflower)
india_status: India 56-60% import-dependent; ~Rs 1.6-1.7 lakh cr import bill

what_it_is: De-oiled meal (soybean/rapeseed/etc.) protein feed
india_status: Record 48.86 LMT exported FY24 worth Rs 15368 cr

what_it_is: Emulsifier phospholipid from soybean crushing
india_status: India imports specialty grades; domestic feed-grade produced

what_it_is: Soy protein concentrate/isolate; food & feed protein
india_status: India crushes soy but imports concentrates

what_it_is: Edible oil from cottonseed (CCI-procured seed)
india_status: CCI procures cotton; seed oil is domestic edible oil

what_it_is: Protein feed cake from cottonseed crushing
india_status: Domestic feed stream

what_it_is: Short fibres -> alpha-cellulose for viscose/MCC/nitrocellulose/cellulose acetate
value_density: Cellulose-derivative mkt USD 1.8 bn (2025) -> USD 3.1 bn (2034)
india_status: India RAW-EXPORTS linters to China/Bangladesh which make high-purity cellulose
